name: Lu Bu

skills.name: Bloodthirsty Ancestry
skills.description: Becomes enhanced when Skill 1 or Ultimate hits an enemy hero. While enhanced, Basic Attacks, Skill 1, and Ultimate deal true damage and restore Health.

skills.name: Impaling Thrust
skills.description: Performs a sweep attack to the target area. Restores a certain amount of Health with each enemy hero hit. Failing to hit a hero will cause the enhancement to disappear.

skills.name: Souleater
skills.description: Slows enemies in the target area and grants a shield for each enemy hit (upto 3 stacks). The shield value is converted to Health over time.

skills.name: Tremble, Mortals
skills.description: Leaps to the target location, launching and damaging enemies within range upon landing, then forming a killing field. While inside the killing field, he gains increased Physical and Magical Defense, while enemies suffer damage and slow.

tips: Lu Bu is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.3% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Succubus Cloak → Blazing Cape → Overlord's Platemail → Sage's Sanctuary.
Run Fate for stats that match Lu Bu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Impaling Thrust → Souleater → Tremble, Mortals → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Lu Bu excels into Heino, Daji, Luna. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Lam, Pei without team peel.

Lu Bu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lu Bu. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Lu Bu good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu is Tier A Tank with 48.3% win rate, 1.2% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Lu Bu build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Succubus Cloak, Blazing Cape, Overlord's Platemail, Sage's Sanctuary. Run Fate arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Lu Bu?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Lam, Pei into Lu Bu. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Lu Bu completes core items. Lu Bu struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Lu Bu counter?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu is strong into Heino, Daji, Luna according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Lu Bu when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Lu Bu good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.3% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lu Bu. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Lu Bu play?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter, Tank). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Lu Bu?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Lu Bu or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Lu Bu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 3.1% more often globally. Choose Lu Bu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Lu Bu?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Tank; 1.2% pick rate but only 0.1% ban rate.
